proposed_domain: Sacred Harp shape-note singing (four-shape and Aikin seven-shape solfège pedagogy)

closest_prior_match.verdict: accept — Gregorian neumes are gestural-melodic-shape notation for plainchant; shape-note is GEOMETRIC-shape-attached-to-pitch redundant pedagogy. Different mechanism class (gestural vs geometric, single-line chant vs four-part shape-note).
